title: The Agentic AI Engineer - Benedikt Sanftl, Mutagent
summary: The Agentic AI Engineer is a methodology for building AI agents using an Eval-Driven Development Loop. It organizes a multi-agent team with an orchestrator that covers spec, build, evaluate, diagnose, monitor, and optimize phases, similar to agent coding loops.
writeup: Benedikt Sanftl of Mutagent presents the "Agentic AI Engineer," a framing of agent development as an eval-driven loop. The method relies on a multi-agent orchestrator team that divides the work into spec, build, evaluate, diagnose, monitor, and optimize phases, with feedback flowing between them. The central claim is that building AI agents becomes a structured, repeatable system rather than ad hoc engineering when evaluation drives each iteration.
